did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article ('State of the art') that presents and evaluates existing applications of AI algorithms for skin cancer detection, rather than using AI to obtain new primary study results. It discusses classic systems, total body systems, and smartphone applications but does not report a new experimental study where AI was used as the method to generate results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
